text:
A single relationship ID will generally relate to more than one CCW_PHARM_ID (i.e., multiple 
pharmacies can have the same overarching company). 

Also, a single chain or franchise, which is represented in this data file as a relationship ID, can function 
as more than one type of dispenser (i.e., it can have different values in the dispenser type code for 
different pharmacies). 

A parent organization (variable called PRNT_ORG_ID) may consist of multiple RELATIONSHIP_IDs. 

Additional details
